violations.text: Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the following areas do not have coving. 1. Walk-in cooler (floor) 2. Prep Area (wall) 3. Ware washing area (floor) The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
